clusters.justification: These terms encompass the broad functional axis of emotional reactivity, mood state, and valence processing intrinsically linked by shared cortico-amygdalar and anterior insula co-activation patterns.

This reflects the overarching macro-domain of appraising stimulus utility, calculating cost-benefit parameters, and driving goal-directed behavior, fundamentally subserved by mesolimbic and frontostriatal circuitry.

These concepts rely on abstract, internally constructed mental models of narratives, identity, and agents, perfectly overlapping with the macroscopic functional topography of the medial fronto-parietal architecture.
